contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 20
- Description: Fix handoff pipeline: corrected protocol doc + posted in-Telegram go for thread 3
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/369
  
  Details:
  Diagnosed why a ping_sophia handoff didn't reach the Telegram-facing Sophia: ping_sophia POSTs to the HTTP /chat-blocking endpoint, which returns the reply to the caller and does NOT post into Telegram or share session memory with the Telegram-side Sophia — so a handoff to a pre-existing thread (3) was answered over HTTP but invisible in Telegram (governor saw 'no handoff'). Fixes: (1) Corrected SOPHIA_HANDOFFS.md (agentic_ai_context PR #369) — removed the false 'session_id bridges to the Telegram topic' claim; codified that the durable handoff is the committed plan + registry, and the ping is a TRIGGER that must instruct Sophia to create the topic if none exists, POST the kickoff+context INTO the Telegram topic, reply with the thread_id, and wait there, so the governor always finds her ready with context. (2) Posted a governor go-ahead with full context into Telegram thread 3 via the bot API (message 1690) authorizing Sophia to begin Issue 1. Flagged an incidental short-lived Google access-token print from sourcing the box .env; will grep single vars going forward.
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 33.33
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
